result.stdout:
Description:
  Omny CMS Builder

Usage:
  Omny.Cms.Builder [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information
  --folder        [default: .]
  --watch         [default: False]
  --debug         [default: False]
